channel.title: Walid El Khoukh — Field Notes
channel.description: Practical notes on AI agents, token efficiency, cloud data platforms, and public-data systems.

item.title: How I Cut Claude Code Token Use by 87%
item.description: The architecture change mattered more than the prompt.

item.title: The Government API Did Not Exist
item.description: Seven production lessons from turning static archives into a reliable data pipeline.
